overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V style) showing a first-person perspective walking along a wet industrial roadside. The scene features passing vehicles including a gray sedan, red pickup truck, and white vintage car, with streetlights illuminating the chain-link fence and metal scaffold structure alongside the road.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet industrial roadside at night, illuminated by streetlights. A chain-link fence runs along the right side with a large metal scaffold tower behind it. A gray sedan drives away from the camera down the road, its red brake lights reflecting on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial roadside with warning signs and graffiti-covered fence

white vintage car approaches from opposite direction and passes by the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the fence line as vehicles pass by in both directions

white vintage car with headlights on approaching from the opposite direction

entered.detail: red and white warning signs reading NO TRESPASSING and VIOLATORS WILL BE PROSECUTED attached to the fence
colorful graffiti tags and spray paint appearing on the chain-link fence

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the industrial road as the metal tower recedes behind. A red pickup truck passes closely on the left, followed by a white vintage car approaching from the opposite direction. The chain-link fence now features prominent warning signs and colorful graffiti tags as the camera progresses toward an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: road intersection with stop marking and cross traffic

four-way intersection with cross streets and traffic signals visible ahead
lit industrial warehouse buildings visible across the intersection in the background

segments.scene_description: Arriving at a road intersection marked with a large white STOP painted on the asphalt. The camera proceeds through the crosswalk as a blue sedan crosses from the right. Industrial buildings are visible in the background across the intersection, while the graffiti-covered fence continues along the right side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a wet industrial roadside at night that progresses from a towering scaffold structure toward a city intersection. It begins beside a chain-link fence under the glow of streetlights, moving past a gray sedan whose brake lights reflect on the damp pavement. As the metal tower recedes, the camera continues forward while a red pickup truck passes on the left and a white vintage car approaches from the opposite direction. The scene then shifts toward an intersection as the fence becomes adorned with colorful graffiti and warning signs, eventually reaching a large white STOP painted on the asphalt. Finally, the camera proceeds through the crosswalk past a crossing blue sedan, revealing industrial buildings in the background.
